metadata.description: Personal marketplace hosting the sentinel security plugin.

plugins.name: sentinel
plugins.description: Comprehensive AI security toolkit: 6 expert personas across 8 scopes (diff, project, STRIDE, url, whole-site DAST, api, apis, NL router). Covers OWASP/API/LLM Top 10, CEH, secrets, dependency CVEs + SBOM, with browser-driven AI DAST behind a hard authorization gate.
